speakers.name: Dr. Sarah Chen
speakers.title: Senior Principal Engineer, Google Robotics
speakers.bio: Dr. Chen leads the perception team at Google Robotics, focusing on embodied AI and human-robot interaction. She holds a PhD from MIT and has 15+ patents in robotic vision.

speakers.name: Prof. Maria Rodriguez
speakers.title: Associate Professor, SJSU Electrical Engineering
speakers.bio: Prof. Rodriguez runs the Intelligent Systems Lab at SJSU. Her research spans reinforcement learning, autonomous systems, and accessible robotics for underserved communities.

speakers.name: Dr. Aisha Patel
speakers.title: Co-Founder & CTO, Autonomy Labs
speakers.bio: Dr. Patel co-founded Autonomy Labs, building autonomous inspection robots for industrial applications. Forbes 30 Under 30, 2024.
